projectPage.failedToLoad: Failed to load the project. Please try again later.
projectPage.projectNotFound: This project could not be found
projectPage.projectNotFoundMessage: The project you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted.

dailyBriefing.title: Daily briefing
dailyBriefing.runningReportHint: It might take a few minutes
dailyBriefing.emptyTitle: Daily recommendations to improve your agent
dailyBriefing.emptyDescription: Every day Ollie reviews the last 24 hours of your project — summarizing what changed, flagging anomalies, and suggesting what to do next.
dailyBriefing.turnOnDialogDescription: Ollie will run every day at {{time}}, reviewing your traces and telling you exactly what to improve.
dailyBriefing.turnOnDialogTokenInfo: Runs on your Ollie tokens. You can turn it off at any time.
dailyBriefing.turnOnDialogRunImmediately: Run the first report immediately on activation
dailyBriefing.turnOnDialogRunImmediatelyDescription: You can customize the schedule time and report instructions in settings.

settingsDialog.title: Daily briefing settings
settingsDialog.activeDescription: Turn off to pause automated reports. You can reactivate at any time.
settingsDialog.pausedDescription: Turn on to resume automated reports.
settingsDialog.customInstructionsPlaceholder: Add custom instructions to tailor the report

recentActivity.title: Recent activity
recentActivity.noActivityDescription: Tracks meaningful activity in this project — new artifacts, updates, and triggered alerts.
